clues.clue: Genius billionaire Tony Stark fights crime in a high-tech suit of armor as this hero.
Bitten by a radioactive arachnid, Peter Parker swings through the city as this hero.
This Asgardian god of thunder wields the enchanted hammer Mjolnir.
When Bruce Banner gets angry, he transforms into this enormous green powerhouse.
Blind attorney Matt Murdock protects Hell's Kitchen as this horned vigilante.
The last son of Krypton lands on Earth and grows up as reporter Clark Kent.
This Amazonian princess wields a golden Lasso of Truth and bullet-blocking bracelets.
Forensic scientist Barry Allen races into action as this 'fastest man alive.'
Pilot Hal Jordan channels willpower through a glowing ring as this corps member.
This trident-wielding monarch rules the undersea kingdom of Atlantis.
Orphaned billionaire Bruce Wayne prowls Gotham at night as this caped figure.
A scrawny recruit named Steve Rogers takes a super-soldier serum to become this star-spangled hero.
Wisecracking mercenary Wade Wilson breaks the fourth wall as this red-suited antihero.
Diana Prince walks among humans while secretly being this Amazon warrior.
Weather-controlling mutant Ororo Munroe leads the X-Men under this codename.
Iron Man, Cap and Thor headline this team billed as 'Earth's Mightiest Heroes.'
Superman, Batman and Wonder Woman anchor this premier DC super-team.
Professor Charles Xavier mentors this family of mutant heroes.
Star-Lord, Groot and Rocket form this cosmic, wisecracking Marvel squad.
clues.response: Who are the Guardians of the Galaxy?

clues.clue: Robin, Starfire and Cyborg form this youthful 'Teen' DC team.
The mad titan Thanos belongs to which of the two big comic publishers?
The New Gods tyrant Darkseid was created at which publisher?
The doomed home planet Krypton comes from which publisher's mythology?
The hidden African nation of Wakanda originates at which publisher?
The acclaimed graphic novel 'Watchmen' was put out by which publisher?

final.clue: This mustachioed writer-editor co-created Spider-Man and the X-Men and made cameos in many Marvel films.
